name: Country Pork Chop Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat pork chops in oil in a heavy skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions and apple; cook until softened, about 10 minutes.
3. Drain VEG-ALL vegetables, reserving the liquid.
4. Stir in reserved liquid, chicken broth, and sugar; bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer until pork chops are cooked through, approximately 25 minutes. Remove chops with tongs.
6. Bring liquid to a boil again. Add chopped vegetables and rice; stir gently.
7. Cook on low heat for 5 minutes or until rice is tender.
8. Serve pork chops over the rice mixture.
